ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the song */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the song was released */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary producer of the song */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the song */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the song */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "tempo" INTEGER /* Tempo of the song in beats per minute (BPM) */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the song (e.g., C Major, G Minor) */,
  "mood" TEXT /* Mood of the song (e.g., happy, sad, energetic) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the song was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the song was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist's genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the producer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the producer */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the producer's genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the producer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the producer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent genre (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_artists" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the artist in the song (e.g., singer, songwriter) */,
  "percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage of the song's ownership held by the artist */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the artist is the primary artist */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the artist is a featured artist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_artists_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_artists_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_producers" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the producer in the song (e.g., primary producer, co-producer) */,
  "percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage of the song's ownership held by the producer */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the producer is the primary producer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_producers_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_producers_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, producer, artist) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the song */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the song was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user at the time of access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser or device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_comments_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)
